description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow for Windows using Conda. The workflow triggers on push and pull request events. It uses a matrix strategy to run on a Windows 2019 environment. The workflow checks out the repository, initializes submodules, sets up Miniconda with a Python 3.7 environment, installs CMake, and updates Conda. It then displays the current directory path, builds Pinocchio using CMake and Visual Studio 2019, and runs tests using CTest.
